creator: kevin@pcmast.com
text:
I have a client (Town of Hooksett, New Hampshire, US) who uses your software (FreeBSD 5.2).  They had a power outage/surge last week and ever since then, they are not getting any email from outside their network.  Is there anything that could have been done to the Unix system that could cause this issue?  From what I can tell, the email goes to the system hosting FreeBDSD V 5.2 and forwards the email to a Windows 2003 Exchange Server.  Any help you could provide would be fantastic.  If you want to reach me by phone, you can call (603) 226-2722.


Thank you for any help you could provide.


Kevin Thompson
Lead Technician
PC Masters
28. South Main St.
Concord, NH  03301
(603) 226-2722
